goals.title: Import OMP source and establish baseline
goals.objective: Copy .omx/tmp-oh-my-pi into repo root including dotfiles excluding nested .git; preserve attribution/license; initialize git if needed; capture baseline build/check status.
goals.evidence: Copied .omx/tmp-oh-my-pi into repo root with rsync excluding nested .git; initialized git; removed temp clone to prevent Biome nested-root conflict; bun install passed; bun run check attempted and fails only baseline Rust formatting; bun run test attempted and fails baseline missing native addon/cargo-nextest. Logs in .omx/verification/g001-*.log.

goals.title: Rebrand package, CLI, TUI, and docs
goals.objective: Rebrand product to gajae-code and CLI to gjc across package scopes, help text, TUI labels/status, and docs; keep OMP/oh-my-pi only in attribution/history.

goals.title: Remove OMP defaults and enforce exact visible definitions
goals.objective: Remove default OMP commands/skills/rules/agents; visible workflow definitions must equal deep-interview, ralplan, ultragoal, team; rewrite/internalize references to non-selected workflows.

goals.title: Preserve inline/local tools while excluding MCP
goals.objective: Preserve local tools such as read/write/edit/bash/search/find/AST/local artifact tools; quarantine/remove MCP dependencies/imports/commands/config/defaults/registries/metadata/docs; add positive local-tool and negative MCP tests.

goals.title: Port selected OMX workflow definitions and private support runtime
goals.objective: Adapt only deep-interview, ralplan, ultragoal, and team definitions; implement private support for planning/worker/review/cleanup concepts without exposing them; rebrand omx references to gjc.

goals.title: Integrate team runtime
goals.objective: Port/adapt ../oh-my-codex team runtime as gjc team with tmux lifecycle, state, mailbox, tasks, status/resume/shutdown; verify no extra worker/team definitions are visible.

goals.title: Integrate ultragoal, ralplan, deep-interview command endpoints
goals.objective: Implement gjc question/state/ultragoal/ralplan/deep-interview; verify artifact creation, state persistence, and checkpoint paths.

goals.title: Full verification, cleanup, docs, and code review
goals.objective: Run TS/Rust build/check/test/lint gates, rebrand and MCP negative greps, local tool positive smoke tests, workflow e2e smoke tests, final cleanup, and code review approval.

codexObjective: Complete the durable gajae-code OMP/OMX runtime plan in .omx/ultragoal/goals.json under the approved RALPLAN constraints; use .omx/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as audit trail.
